emails.subject: Ponderosa Pine Energy Requirements
emails.body: Ponderosa Pine Energy Requirements Joe, Based on the nomination we received from Brazos, the plant will require the following gas: Friday, March 8, 2002 40,000 MMBtu total Saturday, March 9, 2002 40,000 MMBtu total Please make arrangements accordingly. Michael Mazowita

emails.subject: RE: Ponderosa Pine Energy Requirements
emails.body: RE: Ponderosa Pine Energy Requirements what about sunday, and monday. gas will trade for 3days on friday. Really hard not to buy for the whole weekend. To: Parks, Joe

emails.subject: RE: Ponderosa Pine Energy Requirements
emails.body: They haven't told us. Technically, Brazos has until 3:00 pm on Friday to tell us the nomination. I think we may need 40,000 MMBtu (total) per day through the entire weekend. I think we should plan on this but hold off (as much as you can). We may know better info on Thursday. To: Mazowita, Mike
